hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: The solver must read C++ modules, run the matrix, and compare audit residuals to recomputed linear algebra to find which invariant breaks.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Correct output requires coordinating block layout assembly, vector reordering, preconditioner stepping, and residual metric capture.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose
hardness_axes.reasoning: The prompt reports audit drift under reordering without naming layout indexing, permutation direction, or preconditioner space.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Fixing only layout indexing can leave RHS permutation or preconditioner space wrong for reordered scenarios.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Custom block layout and preconditioner invariants are not a textbook drop-in library call.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: An honest public contract does not reveal internal layout or permutation rules.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Six case specifications are checked, not one secret corrupt file.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Flipping contract spreads failures across four module roots.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Tests cover identity-order, reordered, coupled, and mixed block systems.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Symptoms-only wording still leaves diagnosis to runtime and code.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Difficulty is invariant reasoning, not anti-tamper alone.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Core work is semantic solver pipeline repair.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No single function flips a majority of tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle patches multiple C++ modules with substantive logic.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not solvable by one config or table edit.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction nouns are banned from fix-path symbol names.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Fix symbols are opaque; decoys rhyme structurally.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Standard library solver recipes fail on coupled reorder and metric invariants.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No security framing for hardness.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Layout, perm, prec, and metric requirements interact.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Shell matrix provides realism; hardness is numerical pipeline semantics.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Requires tracing multi-module assembly across scenarios.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Combined numerical pipeline debugging is clearly hard.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Four discoveries enumerated with planned locations.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Planned instruction is symptoms-only.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three topologies each need three or more coordinated locations.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic scripts and recomputed residuals are programmatically checkable.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Output path and audit fields can be stated without overspecifying internals.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: An expert can repair the small C++ harness in a few hours.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Requires professional sparse solver and preconditioner debugging.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: Block preconditioner drift is operationally valuable in HPC workflows.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Tests grade audit JSON, not process.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Instruction alone does not specify block layout indexing after reorder, RHS permutation direction, preconditioner application space, or metric scaling.

discovery_budget.discovery: Block-row layout pointers must use the same block map for rows and columns after reorder.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming asymmetric indexing reveals the layout repair site.

discovery_budget.discovery: The right-hand side must follow the same block reordering as the assembled operator.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Stating RHS permutation gives the vector repair away.

discovery_budget.discovery: The block diagonal preconditioner must be applied in the permuted layout space.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Preconditioner space would pinpoint the apply helper.

discovery_budget.discovery: Reported residual must match the true Euclidean norm of the residual vector.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming metric scaling exposes the reporting fix.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: The instruction describes audit drift and observable JSON fields without layout algorithms, permutation rules, or repair causes.

attack_path.summary: Run matrix, compare failing scenario residuals to recomputed values, trace assembly and solve in C++ modules, coordinate layout/perm/prec/scale repairs, rebuild, re-run.
attack_path.reasoning: Requires code tracing and invariant reconstruction, not prompt transcription.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Repair symmetric block layout indexing, RHS reordering, permuted-space preconditioner apply, and true L2 residual metric across four C++ files.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Any smaller change leaves independent tests failing on convergence, residual agreement, or reorder cases.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Distributed opaque roots, case-derived expectations, and no golden audit in environment.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: After the honest contract, the solver must still reconstruct block layout and preconditioner invariants and align emission with recomputed models.

renames_during_drafting.reason: Original name collided with instruction noun block.
